title: Those Who Laugh at Pudding Will Cry over Pudding
overview: Angels Tetsuo Tanba and Misaki Kurogane of the Dandelion Clan chase after a spirit who won't pass on to the afterlife until he apologizes to his wife.

title: To Know Him Is to Punch Him
overview: As the other Clans rush to meet their quotas, Tetsuo and Misaki slack off until an odd robot sends them after a ring-hardened, quick-fisted spirit.

title: You Only Live Once - So Die Laughing!
overview: The Dandelion Clan welcomes a new, uptight member and helps an utterly charming spirit pass on by relaying a final message to her comedian husband.

title: The Dirtier the Mire, the Prettier the Lotus
overview: When Masaki finds Misaki spending her day off in the human realm, Tetsuo shares the surprising story of how they both wound up in the Dandelion Clan.

title: We Were All Geniuses
overview: After they encounter a spirit separated from his body, the Dandelion angels meet the scientist behind the experiment. Masaki's childhood memories surface.

title: Why Do the Worst People Never Stop Smiling?
overview: Hoping to keep the Dandelion Clan in operation, Masaki introduces its newest member: Proto. But is the AI robot truly helpful or part of a shadowy plot?

title: Seize the Moment! Do It Now
overview: The chairman's agenda rapidly reduces the number of earthbound spirits but the collection tank overloads, releasing vengeful souls into the mortal realm.
